meaning: n.长裤与衣相配成套的便服
examples: She suggests a nice skirt or perhaps a pantsuit.
This tailored pantsuit is perfect for formal meetings.
A gray - haired woman in a light green pantsuit was being interviewed.
Taylor Swift channeled Bianca Jagger circa Studio 54 in a white pantsuit from J.
Helmut Newton figured prominently again as an inspiration especially in the pantsuit worn with a bra top.
